steps.title: Use the line of best fit, not the points
steps.content: The question asks for the y-value predicted by the line of best fit. On the graph, move to $x=2$ and read where the line of best fit crosses that vertical position.

steps.title: Estimate the y-value
steps.content: At $x=2$, the line of best fit is closest to $y=15$. The other choices, $4$, $7$, and $10$, are visibly too low for the line at that x-value.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The closest listed value is $15$, which is choice D. Therefore D is correct.
